title: ursinia tridentata
intro: Ursinia tridentata, also known as the Cape daisy or alkanet, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Western Cape region of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ursinia tridentata include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and wounds, as well as its use as a natural dye. The herbal preparation of Ursinia tridentata typically involves drying the roots or flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
